San Churro - Every. Second. Coffee. Free.

Buy a coffee, get your next one on us.
San Churro

Every second coffee is FREE* at San Churro. Through to the 9th of March, el SOCIAL members get every second coffee free.

How it works:

  1. Scan you el SOCIAL barcode when you buy a coffee 
  2. Unlock a FREE coffee for your next visit
  3. Sip & repeat

However you like your coffee, your next one’s on us. More reasons to meet me at San Churro.

We acknowledge and respect the traditional lands and cultures of the Bunurong people of the Kulin Nation, the Traditional Owners and Custodians of the Country on which Pacific Werribee resides, and pay our respects to Elders past and present. We recognise First Nations peoples’ longstanding and ongoing spiritual connections to land, sea, community, and country.
